case_title: STEARNS ENTERPRISES, INC. VS. GRETCHEN MARX

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED DEC-10-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT STEARNS ENTERPRISES, INC. DBA ENGINEERED ENVIRONMENTS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2008 - JUDGMENT.
COPYING FEES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MARX, GRETCHEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT STEARNS ENTERPRISES, INC. DBA ENGINEERED ENVIRONMENTS NOTHING IN THE JUDGMENT SHALL VOID OR INVALIDATE THE EXISTING WARRANTY ON LABOR, GOODS, OR MATERIALS SUPPLIED BY PLAINTIFF TO DEFENDANT GRETCHEN MARX. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
